name: Elephant Ears
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients well and let dough rise for 40 minutes.
2. Punch down the dough and refrigerate until chilled.
3. Break off walnut-sized balls from the dough and flatten into large circles.
4. Deep fry in 1 1/2 inch oil on both sides, then drain on paper towel.
5. Dust with powdered sugar or cinnamon sugar.
